body:
Here are some highly-rated local garage door repair services offering **same-day and 24/7 emergency support** directly in the Pleasanton and Tri-Valley area:

### Local Service Providers

  * **Precision Garage Door of East Bay**

 * **Location:** 405 Boulder Court, Pleasanton, CA 94566 [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton#:~:text=You%20can%20read%20more%20about,our%20location%20on%20Boulder%20Court.)

 * **Phone:** (925) 268-9267 [Pleasanton CA Garage Door Repair • Same-Day Service](https://mydoorteam.com/locations/california/pleasanton/?utm_source=gmb&utm_medium=location_pleasanton&utm_campaign=website#:~:text=Garage%20Maintenance,%3A%20\(925\)%20268%2D9267)

 * **Details:** Locally based directly in Pleasanton. They offer same-day repairs 7 days a week (8:00 AM – 10:00 PM) with no extra charge for evenings or weekends. Their trucks are fully stocked to fix torsion springs, openers, and cables in one visit. [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton#:~:text=Same%2Dday%20service%20is%20available,\(925\)%20268%2D9267%20.)[Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton#:~:text=Garage%20Door%20Repair%20%26%20Service%20in,268%2D9267%20Book%20Online%20Now)

  * **Valiant Garage Door**

 * **Location:** 3588 Pimlico Dr, Pleasanton, CA 94566 [Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/#:~:text=Home%20Services%20Gallery%20Blog%20FAQ,3588%20Pimlico%20Dr&text=Free%20Estimate%20Instantly-,Gallery%20Moenave,4974%20Book%20Free%20Estimate%20Instantly)

 * **Phone:** (925) 409-4974

 * **Details:** A highly rated, founder-led local business offering same-day repair, spring replacements, and emergency support across the East Bay. [Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/#:~:text=Valiant%20Trust%20System,10%2C000%2B%20Doors%20Serviced)

  * **Pleasanton Same Day Garage Door Repair**

 * **Phone:** (925) 488-2130 [Pleasanton Same Day Garage Door Repair (925) 488-2130 Call us 24/7](https://www.pleasantongaragedoorrepair.us/same-day-garage-door-repair-pleasanton-ca#:~:text=Submit-,Request%20a%20quote%20and%20we'll%20send%20you%20our%20best,day%20repair%20service%20near%20you.)

 * **Details:** Offers 24/7 mobile emergency service for off-track doors, broken springs, and commercial or residential opener replacements. [Pleasanton Same Day Garage Door Repair (925) 488-2130 Call us 24/7](https://www.pleasantongaragedoorrepair.us/same-day-garage-door-repair-pleasanton-ca#:~:text=24%2F7%20Repair%20Services%20in,door%20repair%20service%20in%20Pleasanton.)

### Common Emergency Issues They Handle:

  * **Broken Torsion Springs:** If your door is too heavy to lift or you heard a loud snap.

  * **Snapped Cables:** Causes the garage door to hang crookedly or get jammed.

  * **Opener Malfunctions:** Motor running but the door isn't moving, or safety sensors blocking the door from closing.

_If you are looking for immediate scheduling, calling them directly via phone is usually the fastest way to secure a same-day technician slot._
